items.text:
CASTING – WARSZAWA

Poszukuję 2 aktorek do krótkometrażowego filmu dokumentalnego o cosplayu realizowanego na zaliczenie studiów filmowych.

Szukam przede wszystkim dwóch dziewczyn:
– w wieku około 15–18 lat (lub wyglądających młodo),
– o podobnym wzroście,
– podobnej budowie ciała,
– najlepiej również podobnych wizualnie od tyłu (włosy, sylwetka itp.).

Film będzie trwał około 4–5 minut i będzie oparty głównie na ruchu ciała oraz obecności na ekranie. aktorki nie mają kwestii mówionych.

Całość rozgrywa się na scenie teatralnej.
W filmie występują tylko:
– 2 aktorki,
– oraz jedna osoba, z którą przeprowadzany będzie wywiad na temat cosplayu.

Zdjęcia odbędą się w Warszawie i potrwają 1 dzień.
Dojazd we własnym zakresie.

Oferuję 100 zł dla każdej aktorki oraz jedzenie na planie (np. pizza lub coś podobnego wybranego przez aktorkę).

Termin zdjęć:
Na pewno nie później niż 21 maja. Dokładna data jest jeszcze ustalana, ponieważ trwa organizacja i wynajem lokalizacji.

Dodatkowo dowiedziałem się od szkoły, że jedna ze stacji telewizyjnych (nazwa nie została jeszcze podana) jest zainteresowana odpłatnym pokazywaniem wybranych prac studentów mojej uczelni, więc istnieje szansa, że film zostanie pokazany w telewizji.

Do piątku wyślę storyboard (komiks bez dialogów pokazujący ruch aktorów), scenopis (plan wydarzeń filmu), a gdy tylko będę miał dostęp, prześlę również zdjęcia lokalizacji oraz podam jej dokładny adres.

W zgłoszeniu proszę wysłać:
– kilka aktualnych zdjęć,
– demo aktorskie / krótki filmik video zawierający krótką scenkę aktorską oraz pokazanie się z każdej strony,
– imię i nazwisko,
– wiek,
– wzrost,
– rozmiar ubrań.

⏰ Zgłoszenia można wysyłać do 14 maja do godziny 00:00.

 Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać:
– w wiadomości prywatnej,
– na e-mail: [maciejjozefkarolbuk@gmail.com](mailto:maciejjozefkarolbuk@gmail.com),
– lub pod numer telefonu: 734 160 222.

Poniżej w załączniku przesyłam również plan wydarzeń filmu.

items.text:
🎬 POSZUKIWANI STATYŚCI: AMERYKAŃSKA RODZINA (ZAKWATEROWANI W JEDNYM AUCIE! 🚗)
Do studenckiego projektu krótkometrażowego poszukujemy osób, które wcielą się w rolę amerykańskiej rodziny.

Szukamy najlepiej "w pakiecie"! Bardzo zależy nam na zgłoszeniach grupowych (np. prawdziwe rodziny, pary, grupy znajomych), które mogą przyjechać na plan wspólnym transportem. Chcemy ograniczyć liczbę samochodów na planie i zadbać o ekologię naszej produkcji! 

TERMINY I LOKACJE:

📍 15.05 (ok. 1h w ciągu dnia) – Brwinów

📍 16.05 (pełny dzień) – Brwinów

📍 17.05 (pełny dzień) – Michałów k. Warszawy

Dojazd we własnym zakresie (szukamy ekip zmotoryzowanych).

KOGO SZUKAMY?

Osób w różnym wieku (rodzice, dzieci, dziadkowie) o typie urody pasującym do amerykańskich przedmieść (patrz: zdjęcia referencyjne).

Rola bez kwestii mówionych.

W ZAMIAN OFERUJEMY:

✨ Super atmosferę i spotkanie z uznaną obsadą.

✨ Materiały do portfolio.

(Projekt studencki – bez wynagrodzenia finansowego).

JAK SIĘ ZGŁOSIĆ?

Jeśli masz ekipę/rodzinę, z którą możesz przyjechać, wyślij wspólne zgłoszenie na adres:

📧 production@to-dofilms.com

W tytule: Statuści – Amerykańska Rodzina [+ liczba osób]

W treści: Imiona, wiek, numery kontaktowe oraz wspólne zdjęcie (lub zdjęcia każdego z członków ekipy).

Do zobaczenia na planie! 🎥🇺🇸

🎬 OGŁOSZENIE – STATYŚCI DO NOWEGO SERIALU 🎬

Do nowego współczesnego serialu poszukujemy statystów do sceny w Tawernie

📅 Terminy zdjęć: 11 i 12 maja  
🕐 Zbiórki: około godziny 13:00  
🌗 Zdjęcia: dzienno-nocne  
📍 Lokalizacja: Rynia nad Zegrzem

💰 Stawka:  
– 340 zł za dwa dni zdjęciowe (płatne drugiego dnia)  
– 400 zł łącznie dla osób, które przyjadą samochodem i zabiorą minimum 3 osoby (płatne drugiego dnia)

🚗 Mile widziane osoby zmotoryzowane

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na maila:  
impresariat.kamedstudio@gmail.com 
Temat wiadomości: TAWERNA

Jeśli możesz być dostępny/a tylko jednego dnia, koniecznie zaznacz to w zgłoszeniu.  
(Pierwszeństwo mają osoby dyspozycyjne przez oba dni.)

📝 W zgłoszeniu prosimy zawrzeć:
– imię i nazwisko  
– numer telefonu  
– aktualne zdjęcie (twarz + sylwetka)

Zapraszamy do współpracy! 🎥

sharedPost.text:
Taking it back to last Sunday, it was truly an amazing night filled with incredible people, infectious energy, and a fantastic venue. We cannot thank you all enough for the continued support and love you’ve shown the festival.

A special thank you goes out to our sponsors, including our photography sponsor for the evening, Casper Photography—be sure to check out her work to see the night through her lens. As we look forward to Season 7 and an even bigger year ahead, you can view all the photos from the ceremony by visiting the link below:

https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1i80cA9KkIZhATFo221QX0ZmSqenXVktq?usp=drive_link

#kickassfilmfest #filmfestival #awardceremony #film #coloradofilm

www.kickassfilmfest.com

items.text:
**🎬 CASTING CALL — COMEDY CLUB AUDIENCE EXTRAS 🎤**
**for the short film: *****KEPT GOING***
**Written & Directed by **Jordan Jackson

**Ever wanted to be part of a comedy show that goes HORRIBLY wrong?**

**We’re looking for audience extras to fill out a comedy club scene for our upcoming short film *****Kept Going***** — a dark comedy/survival short made as part of a 13-film challenge series.**

**📅 FILMING DATE: MAY 17TH, 2026**

**You’ll be:**

·         **reacting to stand-up comedy**

·         **witnessing a comedian absolutely destroy his own career in real time**

·         **laughing, gasping, judging, cringing, and helping create the chaotic energy of the film**

** **

**AND:**

**1.   You WILL be seen on camera**

**2.   Includes IMDb Credit**

**3.   Great chance to network & be part of a fun indie set experience**

**━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━**

**🎭 ROLE:**
**Comedy Club Audience Members**
**(all looks/types welcome)**

**━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━**

**🎬 ABOUT THE FILM**

***Kept Going***** follows Nate, a cocky stand-up comedian who refuses to stop digging himself deeper after making jokes at the expense of the wrong person. What starts as an awkward comedy set spirals into a bizarre survival nightmare deep in the woods involving kidnappers, fake ancestry, family secrets… and a wooden moose.**

**Tone-wise imagine:**

**1.   awkward stand-up comedy**

**2.   wilderness survival chaos**

**3.   psychological humiliation**

**4.   the dumbest possible decisions made with complete confidence**

**━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━**

**📍 Filming Location:**
**Colorado Springs, Colorado**

**🕒 Shoot Duration:**
**2 Hours & 30 Minutes**
**(3:30 PM – 6:00 PM)**

**Compensation:**
**Non-paid**
**IMDb Credit + footage + guaranteed visibility on screen**

**━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━**

**📩 TO JOIN:**
**Message me directly or email:**
**[jjacks24@uccs.edu](mailto:jjacks24@uccs.edu)**

**Include:**
**• Name**
**• Age**
**• Recent photo/selfie**
**• Availability**

**Come laugh at a man ruining his life in real time.**

Genre: A coming‑of‑age.

Title: Her Name Was Maria. 

The actors who can read: 2 teenage boys (14-15) and 1 male (late 20-30) are needed.

Date and Time:  May 23, 2026, 10 AM–2 PM (likely done by 1 PM)  

Location: Ross Cherry Creek Branch Library

What I’m offering:

$20 stipend

Snacks of your choice

Fresh kimbap for everyone

If this sounds fun or meaningful to you, please comment or message me. I’d love to work with you.

sharedPost.text:
Der Kino Mittwoch auf radioYpsilon 

MOVIETIME KW 20/2026

ULTIMATIVES MÄH, LUDWIG THOMA VERFILMUNG UND EIN KULTKLASSIKER WIRD 40

Glennkill: Ein Schafskrimi ist der weltberühmte Debütroman der deutschen Autorin Leonie Swann. Die Geschichte dreht sich um eine irische Schafherde, die einen mysteriösen Mord aufklärt und dabei auf einige skurrile Menschen trifft.

Ein Grantler klopft an die Himmelstür und erlebt dabei eine Riesenüberraschung. Ob das Remake des Literaturklassikers EIN MÜNCHNER IM HIMMEL etwas taugt oder bloß fürs Auszuzzeln der Weisswürste reicht berichtet ihnen Sarah Fuchs. Wir kredenzen dazu ein exklusives Interview mit einem wiederauferstandenen Maximilian Brückner.

In einem weiteren Gespräch erzählt Produzentin Alice Royoux über die Entstehung und realen Hintergründe des Filmes ALL MY SISTERS. 

Der Actionfilm Top Gun – Sie fürchten weder Tod noch Teufel aus dem Jahr 1986 katapultierte Tom Cruise endgültig in den globalen Superstar-Olymp. Der Kultfilm besticht durch seine für die damalige Zeit revolutionären Luftaufnahmen, den ikonischen 80er-Jahre-Stil und einen Oscar-prämierten Soundtrack. Anlässlich des Jubiläums schießen wir die Musik daraus mit MACH 5 durch ihren Subwoofer.

Mittwoch 13.5.2026 von 18 bis 19h auf radioYpsilon 94.5 oder via Stream (http://mp3.radioypsilon.at:8000/)

Fotocredit:Paramount Pictures/Constantin Film

sharedPost.text:
Für einen offenen Mitmach-Workshop am 27.6. vor dem Rathaus in Gladbeck suchen wir aktuell weitere Tanzdozent:innen, Trainer:innen und Choreograf:innen aus Commercial, Urban Dance, Hip-Hop und ähnlichen Styles. Außerdem vergeben wir noch einzelne Slots für starke Showacts und Dancecrews. Die Teilnahme ist kostenlos – und der ÖPNV in Gladbeck ist an diesem Tag frei! Melde dich jetzt bei: info@uptodance.de

#dancejob #showact #dancecrew

items.text:
CASTING CALL "FRANK"
Für unseren zweiten No-Budget-Kurzfilm "Cry Sam" suchen wir eine passende Besetzung für die Rolle des "Frank".

* männliche Rolle
* Spielalter: 30 bis 40 Jahre
* Drehzeitraum: 05. bis 09. Oktober
* Drehort: Neckar-Odenwald

Weitere Infos zum Film & der Rolle könnt ihr der Outline entnehmen. (Das Bild in der Outline dient lediglich der Illustration und ist nicht bindend oder unsere Erwartung.)

Richtet eure Bewerbung mit Referenzen bitte an:

katlenafilms@gmail.com

Wir freuen uns auf euch 

Lena & Ann-Katrin

CASTING CALL "FRANK"
Für unseren zweiten No-Budget-Kurzfilm "Cry Sam" suchen wir eine passende Besetzung für die Rolle des "Frank".

* männliche Rolle
* Spielalter: 30 bis 40 Jahre
* Drehzeitraum: 05. bis 09. Oktober
* Drehort: Neckar-Odenwald

Weitere Infos zum Film & der Rolle könnt ihr der Outline entnehmen. (Das Bild in der Outline dient lediglich der Illustration und ist nicht bindend oder unsere Erwartung.)

Richtet eure Bewerbung mit Referenzen bitte an:

katlenafilms@gmail.com

Wir freuen uns auf euch 

Lena & Ann-Katrin

items.text:
CASTING CALL – NON-UNION – PAID
LOS ANGELES / PHILADELPHIA / MIAMI

Independent feature film “The Great Beyond” is currently casting supporting roles for an upcoming production scheduled to film June 10–12, 2026.

COMPENSATION  

Paid roles — rates starting at $1,000 depending on role and experience.

CASTING BREAKDOWN  

• Female | Ages 34–48  

• Male | Ages 34–35  

• Male | Ages 45–60  

Seeking performers with strong emotional depth and on-camera presence. Prior acting experience preferred but not required.

SHOOT DATES  

Actors must be fully available for all scheduled filming dates.

SUBMISSION DEADLINE  

May 29, 2026

TO SUBMIT  

Please send the following materials:

• Current headshot  

• Acting reel or self-tape  

• Contact information  

• Resume (if available)

Email submissions to:  

vsafkhan09@gmail.com

Selected applicants will be contacted directly with additional production details, audition information, and callback instructions.

items.title: CASTING CALL

items.text:
🚨 Hey everyone!��I’m building out a strong acting/modeling portfolio and could use some outside perspective.

I already have commercials and video work in my portfolio, but I’m dialing in the photo side and want honest input on what actually stands out for industry use.

Here’s a folder with all my raw images:
https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1OPstwrVcfZw2b7rJ0EN3xbOM2Os0H1K8?usp=sharing

If you’re open to helping:
• Open the folder in grid view  
• Scroll through and pick the strongest shots for acting/modeling  
• When you find one you like, open it and comment: YES  

Only mark the ones you genuinely think are strong. No need to go through everything.

If you can, try to keep it to your top 15–30 images.

Appreciate any time you put into this. Getting real outside feedback helps me narrow this down fast.

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – KURZFILM „CARLINA“

Für unseren poetischen Kurzfilm *CARLINA* suchen wir Darsteller*innen für vier zentrale Rollen.

Der Film erzählt von Nähe, Sehnsucht, Verlust und unausgesprochenen Spannungen in der Abgeschiedenheit einer alpinen Bergwelt. Im Mittelpunkt stehen starke emotionale Präsenz, reduziertes Spiel und Ausdruck über Blick, Körpersprache und Stille.

📍 Drehort: Nähe Lunz am See, Niederösterreich
📅 Drehzeitraum: 05.06.2026 – 11.06.2026
🎞 Studentenproduktion / No-Budget
🍽 Unterkunft & Verpflegung vorhanden
🎥 Festival-Einreichungen geplant

Gesucht werden Darsteller*innen für die Rollen:
– Magdalena
– Johann
– Lukas
– Wolfgang

Alle weiteren Informationen zu Rollen, Anforderungen und Projekt findet ihr in den Bildern des Posts.

📩 Bewerbungen bitte bis spätestens **17.05.2026** an:
**hochland.kurzfilm@gmail.com**

Wir freuen uns auf eure Bewerbungen!

items.text:
Statisten aller Altersgruppen für inszenierte Hochzeit gesucht / Zürich, Schweiz 

Für ein studentisches Fotoprojekt und Film suche ich Models und Statisten aller Altersgruppen für eine inszenierte Hochzeit im Kanton Zürich. Vorkenntnisse oder eine bestimmte berufliche Tätigkeit sind nicht erforderlich.

Das Projekt ist leider unbezahlt. Als Dankeschön biete ich euch jedoch ein professionelles Fotoshooting oder auf Wunsch auch ein kleines Video- bzw. Content-Shooting für eure eigenen Bedürfnisse an – egal ob Portraits, Paarfotos, Bewerbungsbilder, Social Media oder etwas anderes.

Das Shooting findet im Mai/Juni statt und dauert ungefähr einen halben Tag. Für Essen und Getränke ist selbstverständlich gesorgt.

Bei Interesse freue ich mich über eine Nachricht mit ein paar Infos zu euch.

items.text: Zapraszamy na inspirujący weekend ze śpiewem 🌿🌞

sharedPost.text:
Pośpiewał(a)byś, choć niekoniecznie umiesz? Spoko 🌞 

To zaproszenie jest dla osób, które lubią las, rozmowy, weekend bez agendy i bez powiadomień. 

I dla tych, którzy lubią - albo chcieliby spróbować - śpiewać z innymi.

3-5 lipca, Gęsikowo - osada leśna na Warmii

Weekend z Anią Brodą - Bardką Warmii. 
Ciepłą, uważną, magiczną. Ania Broda

Będą pieśni ludowe, krąg głosu, wileńskie cymbały.
Oddech.

Plus: kąpiel leśna z Jackiem Grygutisem Odważniki, jezioro, taniec na trawie, łóżko pod moskitierą w ogrodzie pod wielkim dębem, jedzenie z elementami dzikiej kuchni (Aga gotuje wegetariańsko, syto, kolorowo).

Mała grupa, stara drewniana leśniczówka, ogród przechodzący w las.
Bez wymagań. Z ciekawością.
#warmia #gesikowo #koloniedladorosłych #warsztaty #śpiew  #Las #weekendodcodziennosci
Więcej informacji i zapisy - w wydarzeniu 👇

items.text:
🎬 PAID CASTING CALL — Toronto (Downtown) — Non-Union

Casting a Caucasian actor (28–45, M/F) to play a university Professor / TA in a short comedic video for a Toronto tech startup. Content runs on Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Xiaohongshu, Douyin. Non-broadcast, 1-year social usage.

Character

A polite, slightly distant academic who declines a student's request for a recommendation letter using elevated, jargon-heavy phrasing. Not antagonistic — genuinely believes they're being reasonable. Humor is grounded realism, NOT sketch. Think: any young professor who said "hmm" before gently crushing your hopes.

Details

— Non-Union

— Rate: $50 CAD flat, 1.5-hour shoot, paid same-day via e-transfer

— Downtown Toronto

— Potential recurring bookings for strong fits

— On-screen credit + reel footage on request

To apply, email jim1572780120@yahoo.com with:

1. Recent headshot or clear photo

2. Short self-tape (under 30 sec) of the side below — phone selfie is fine

3. Which of April 24/25/26 works

4. Reel / IG (optional)

No slate needed.

AUDITION SIDE

Student (off-camera, imagine): "Please, professor — I really need this recommendation letter."

Professor: "Sorry, but I have a strict numerical limit. My endorsement isn't a commodity."

[Beat.]

Professor: "I only prioritize candidates who demonstrate interdisciplinary synergy."

Direction

Polite, mildly distant, fully believes they're being reasonable. The three key phrases ("strict numerical limit," "isn't a commodity," "interdisciplinary synergy") should sound like everyday vocabulary — no self-awareness, no heaviness. Pacing slightly faster than the student can process.

Replies within 24 hours.

items.text:
CASTING CALL — FEMALE ACTORS WANTED 🎬
We’re casting females for an upcoming independent film project looking for bold, fearless personalities with chaotic, goofy, savage energy.

💋 Think:

🔪 Psycho / killer vibe

🃏 Wild & unpredictable personality

🤣 Funny, fearless chemistry

💄 Harley Quinn type energy

🔥 Female gang / dark humor aesthetic

✨ ALL RACES WELCOME ✨

🎭 No acting experience needed

🔞 Must be 21+

⭐ IMDb Credit Included

💰 Unpaid passion project

📍 Filming Date: MAY 13

📍 Location Las Vegas location & filming time provided day of shoot

We’re looking for girls who are:

✔ Comfortable on camera

✔ Able to play aggressive/funny roles

✔ Good with teamwork & energy

✔ Ready to bring crazy characters to life

📩 DM TO AUDITION

Send:

• Name

• Age

• Photos

• Social media (if any)

• Acting experience (optional)

🖤 Serious inquiries only.

DM for any additional questions or details.

“We Make Our Own Rules.” 🖤

🚨 NOW SEEKING YOUTH PERFORMERS FOR THE JUNETEENTH TOUR 🚨

The Juneteenth Tour is a multi-city East Coast run featuring performances at festivals, community events, summer celebrations, media opportunities + more during Juneteenth week 🎤✨

We are currently looking for up to 2 additional performers to join Ah’Lia Am’Unique (instagram.com/ahliaamunique) and Ximena P (instagram.com/ximenapryce) on tour.

Artists selected will gain opportunities including:
• Performing in multiple cities
• Regional audience growth
• Digital + physical marketing materials
• Ad campaigns + promo content
• Brand partnership opportunities
• Radio/media opportunities (interviews and possible airplay. We successfully helped get Ah’Lia Am’Unique’s song “Bicycle” featured on Atlanta’s V103 with DJ Greg Street just today!🔥)
• Industry guidance to help grow their brand + revenue streams

Requirements:
• Must be 15 years old or younger
• Must have at least 1 original song
• Must submit music + a performance video
• Must be available for ALL tour dates + TBD group rehearsal dates
• Must have a tour/travel budget
• Do not have to be local, but must be able to be in Atlanta when it starts (group rehearsals and meetings prior to can be virtual)

To be considered:
📧 info@rightpryceent.com

OR

📲 Post/tag/share your music + videos on IG using @RightPryceEnt #TheJuneteenthTour26

Follow Right Pryce Entertainment Group:
instagram.com/rightpryceent/

⏳ Submission deadline: May 15th

We are currently looking for a Director for an exciting two-week summer production of The Addams Family Musical, taking place in Northern Ireland.

The successful candidate would need to be available to attend auditions on 24th May, with the main production/rehearsal period running from 2nd August to 15th August.

We are looking for someone experienced, reliable, confident working with young performers, and able to support the musical direction of a high-quality youth production.

If you are available, or know someone suitable, please comment below or send me a private message with your details and experience.

items.text:
CASTING CALL – LONDON – THEATRE – PROFIT SHARE

We are casting for a new revival/adaptation of **Sophocles’ Antigone**, presented as part of the **Camden Fringe Festival 2026**. Following the successful earlier staging of the production in April, we are now seeking new actors due to the unavailability of some previous cast members. We are looking for performers who are ready to jump straight into an active rehearsal process and work within a fast-paced ensemble environment.

Performances will take place on **8th and 9th August 2026** at the **Barons Court Theatre, London**.

This is an **independent, low-budget profit-share production**, developed by producer and actress **Ioanna Firaku** and director/co-producer **Una Reitere**. Performers will be paid through shared ticket-sale profits. While finances are modest, we are committed to creating a focused, collaborative, and artistically ambitious production.

ROLES AVAILABLE

Creon, Teiresias/Guard and Haemon

We strongly encourage performers of all backgrounds, ethnicities, genders, and abilities to apply. Casting will be inclusive and non-traditional, and all performers should be open to collaborative ensemble and chorus work.

As this production has already undergone an initial development and performance process, we are especially interested in actors who are adaptable, proactive, and confident learning material quickly.

Some roles are text-heavy and require strong memorisation skills, emotional range, physicality, and stamina.

REHEARSALS & PERFORMANCE

* Rehearsals will take place **in person in Highgate, London**.
* Rehearsal dates will be confirmed following casting selections, but rehearsals are expected to take place across **May, June, July and first week of August 2026***.
* Performances will take place on **8th & 9th August 2026**.
* Venue: **Barons Court Theatre, London**.
* Production presented as part of the **Camden Fringe Festival 2026**.

TO APPLY

Please email **antigone.production2026@gmail.com **with:

* The role(s) you would like to be considered for
* A headshot and CV and/or Spotlight link

Selected applicants will be sent a short self-tape audition script.

**Application deadline:** 20/05/2026 midnight

If you have any questions, please feel free to reach out via email.

Thank you,
**Ioanna & Una**

items.text:
NORTH LONDON and HERTFORDSHIRE AREAS
Science Boffins is currently looking for more phenomenal Science Boffins to help us to bring science to life for primary school children. We have parties, schools and events throughout the year.

You don't need a formal background in science as we teach you everything you'll need to know.

All you need is access to a car (unless London based), the ability to work some weekends/weekdays and the desire to launch rockets, concoct potions and generally share just how much fun science can be.

HOW DOES BEING A SCIENCE BOFFIN WORK?

For the right person, this could be the most fun way of making an extra income.

You'll get to enjoy inspiring and educating children, having a fantastic time and getting paid along the way. You'll travel to an event in your local area and bring science to life for primary school age children with some brilliant science experiments.

Are you a fun, enthusiastic and reliable person and able to communicate effectively and promptly to potential bookings? Then join a nationwide team of 40+ well-paid Science Boffin presenters.  We have a strong reputation, rave reviews, and the privilege of working with some globally recognised companies.

We're a friendly bunch and have a (we think!) cracking training program to help you get up to speed. If that sounds like you? You too can become one of our amazing Science Boffins and bring science alive to children.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Annette

Science Boffins

AUDITION NOTICE: Barefoot in the Park

Barefoot in the Park by Neil Simon follows Paul and Corie Bratter, a pair of newlyweds moving into their first apartment in 1960s Greenwich Village. The honeymoon phase is quickly tested by a tiny, top-floor walk-up with no heat, a hole in the skylight, and a cast of eccentric neighbours. As Paul’s straight-laced legal mind clashes with Corie’s spontaneous, free-spirited nature, the couple must navigate their first major marital spat and decide if they can truly walk "barefoot in the park" together.

Creative Team:        Director: Julianne Christie          Producers: Janet Ellis, Michele Partridge

Production Details:
Audition Date: May 20, 2026
Audition & Performance Location: Peninsula Studio Theatre, 14600 North Bluff Rd, White Rock, BC
Rehearsals: Specific Dates TBD. June – September 2026
Performance Dates: September 17 – 27, 2026
Compensation: Actor Honorarium provided.
Perks: Free parking and food/refreshments provided at all rehearsals.

Character Breakdown:
Corie Bratter (Lead, Female, 20s to 30s): A free-spirited, optimistic newlywed who sees the world through rose-colored glasses. Must have high energy and excellent comedic timing.
Paul Bratter (Lead, Male, 20s–30s): HAS BEEN CAST
***Ethel Banks (Supporting, Female, 40s–60s): Corie’s cautious and slightly weary mother. She finds herself on an unexpected adventure thanks to her daughter.
Victor Velasco (Supporting, Male, 40s–60s): The eccentric, colourful, and flirtatious neighbour from the attic. A larger-than-life character.
Telephone Repairman (Supporting, Open Age/Male): A grounded character who gets a front-row seat to the Bratters' domestic chaos.
Delivery Person (Supporting, Open Age/Male): A comedic role focused on the physical toll of climbing those six flights of stairs.

**Submission Instructions:
Please email your headshot and resume to: Janet Ellis, Executive Director, janet@peninsulaproductions.org

Selection Process: Sides and a specific audition time will be emailed to those selected to audition on May 20.
Deadline: Please submit your materials promptly for consideration.

We look forward to hearing from you!

#auditions #play #summer #actors

items.text:
We're in Vancouver!
Hello Hollywood North! Howard here from Repunzel (https://www.instagram.com/repunzelforactors/), and I was sent here by one of your actors on the r/VancouverActors subreddit.

We are an agent submission app that's pretty popular in the US and we've been getting quite a few requests for lists outside of the US markets, so we made one for our neighbors to the north! We are now looking for a few beta testers for our Vancouver Agent List.

**Details:**

The beta test is completely free. You'll have full access to the app with all features unlocked.

We're looking for 5-10 Vancouver actors with all varying degrees of experience who are looking for representation.

You can be unrepresented or looking to change your representation.

Actors of color are very encouraged to apply!

You'll be asked to give some brief feedback about the experience afterwards.

‎

https://forms.gle/TSMKLvMSZagC8rrG9

‎

If you have any questions about the beta or the service in general, feel free to DM me.

Looking forward to helping a few actors on here get some fantastic representation!

Thank you!

Howard

items.text:
Documentary

Adults 60+

Volunteer 

I’m developing a small independent documentary project in Vancouver about older adults who have something they want to do, try, learn, experience, or share.  

The goal is not achievement — just honest human stories.

I’m looking for people around 60+ who may be interested in having a conversation and potentially participating in the documentary.

This is a small volunteer-based independent project with no acting experience required.

If interested, please send an email to **pikedreamsfilms@gmail.com** You’re also welcome to send a short video introducing yourself and sharing something you would still like to do, experience, or express in your life.

topComments.text: I am 70 next weekend the 23 of May and was in Canadian Army Reserve in 1976 era and now a Lions Club member for last 46 years, a Mason for 25 years and also a Shriner before Covid happened. . Also a Scout leader in 1978 and 79 before Lions club. I am a very proud Canadian. Besides i wasn't even a Canadian citizen but got into the Canadian forces..I am keen on working with you and your organization. Thanks.
I am just 50 but I like to do this volunteer, can I ?

items.text:
To bardzo proste rolki, a samo nagranie nie wymaga dużego zaangażowania. Na start chodzi o około 30 miesięcznie. Zależy nam na kimś, kto:
Szukamy osoby z Warszawy lub okolic do nagrywania TikToków przed kamerą na podstawie gotowych scenariuszy.

To bardzo proste rolki, a samo nagranie nie wymaga dużego zaangażowania. Na start chodzi o około 30 miesięcznie. Zależy nam na kimś, kto:

🎥 dobrze czuje się przed kamerą

🧑‍💼 mówi naturalnie i pewnie

📆 jest dyspozycyjny do regularnej współpracy

🎙️ ma gotowość, by stawić się w naszym studiu na szkolenie

🤝 podchodzi do pracy konkretnie i odpowiedzialnie

Zapewniamy wsparcie nie tylko na początku, ale także w dalszej współpracy. Szukamy osoby, z którą chcemy zbudować dłuższą współpracę.

Wymagania techniczne:

📱 telefon odpowiadający dzisiejszym standardom, najlepiej iPhone 14 lub nowszy, Samsung S23 lub nowszy, ewentualnie inny flagowiec

🎙️ mile widziane ale nie wymagane posiadanie mikrofonu, świateł i podstawowego sprzętu do nagrań

Jeśli brzmi to jak coś dla Ciebie, napisz wiadomość prywatną i prześlę szczegóły.

Oczekujemy długiej współpracy.

**ВЕРСИЯ НА РУССКОМ**

🎬 КАСТИНГ В КЛИП — КРАКОВ 🎬

Для съёмок рэп-клипа ищем мужчин со среднеазиатской внешностью (Монголия, Казахстан, Кыргызстан, Узбекистан и др.) на роль **поваров**.

**Требования:**
* Мужчины, возраст 25–55 лет
* Среднеазиатская / монгольская внешность
* Приветствуются курящие (сигарета в кадре)
* Свободны: **25 мая**, Краков

**Условия:**
* **150 zł / час**
* Съёмка: 1–2 часа
* Опыт не требуется

📩 Оставьте комментарий или напишите в ЛС

Smashed it last night in ADULT BEGINNERS! Quick session, all learned in an hour, drilling out the moves and working on our speed of movement in a faster, more commercial routine. Is it perfection? No! But for an hours hard graft they ROCKED IT! 🥰🙌 And the vibe was insane! 👌

Why not come and join us next time? This class is for anybody, even if you haven’t danced before!! With my guidance you’ll be amazed what you can do! (Details in the comments.)

•There is a champagne presentation, from which you get an additional 10%-15% bonus on your salary (depending on the club that accepts you)

•Working hours from 9:30 PM to 3:30 AM

•Contract from 3 months

🔷EMPLOYER PROVIDES

•Visa (work permit)

•Flight

•Apartment

•Meals twice a day

•Salary - $900 + 10-15% from the champagne presentation (depending on the club that accepts you)

‼️ NO CONSUMATION 

🫶We look forward to collaborating

items.text:
🎬 POSZUKIWANI STATYŚCI: AMERYKAŃSKA RODZINA (ZAKWATEROWANI W JEDNYM AUCIE! 🚗)
Do studenckiego projektu krótkometrażowego poszukujemy osób, które wcielą się w rolę amerykańskiej rodziny.

Szukamy najlepiej "w pakiecie"! Bardzo zależy nam na zgłoszeniach grupowych (np. prawdziwe rodziny, pary, grupy znajomych), które mogą przyjechać na plan wspólnym transportem. Chcemy ograniczyć liczbę samochodów na planie i zadbać o ekologię naszej produkcji! 

TERMINY I LOKACJE:

📍 15.05 (ok. 1h w ciągu dnia) – Brwinów

📍 16.05 (pełny dzień) – Brwinów

📍 17.05 (pełny dzień) – Michałów k. Warszawy

Dojazd we własnym zakresie (szukamy ekip zmotoryzowanych).

KOGO SZUKAMY?

Osób w różnym wieku (rodzice, dzieci, dziadkowie) o typie urody pasującym do amerykańskich przedmieść (patrz: zdjęcia referencyjne).

Rola bez kwestii mówionych.

W ZAMIAN OFERUJEMY:

✨ Super atmosferę i spotkanie z uznaną obsadą.

✨ Materiały do portfolio.

(Projekt studencki – bez wynagrodzenia finansowego).

JAK SIĘ ZGŁOSIĆ?

Jeśli masz ekipę/rodzinę, z którą możesz przyjechać, wyślij wspólne zgłoszenie na adres:

📧 production@to-dofilms.com

W tytule: Statuści – Amerykańska Rodzina [+ liczba osób]

W treści: Imiona, wiek, numery kontaktowe oraz wspólne zdjęcie (lub zdjęcia każdego z członków ekipy).

Do zobaczenia na planie! 🎥🇺🇸

**Now Casting: Have You Had FLAWLESS Facial Plastic Surgery? (Major Cable Network: Paid + Cash Prize) **

* *Have you had plastic surgery on your face but no one can tell? *
* *Do you have a flawless, natural-looking appearance that gives nothing away?* 
* Is the type of work that no one can detect? 

Casting producers are looking for people in the greater Los Angeles area who’ve had cosmetic facial procedures—not simply Botox or fillers—to take part in a fun, light-hearted social experiment competition series. If you’re proud of your look and have a fun personality, we want to meet you! This is a one-day shoot in the Los Angeles area. Selected participants will 💰**BE PAID**💰 and will also have the opportunity to win a cash prize.

For more information or to apply, email socialexperimentcasting01@gmail.com **Or apply directly here: **[https://socialexperimentparticipantform.castingcrane.com/](https://socialexperimentparticipantform.castingcrane.com/)

items.text:
Hello all! I'm producing the first chapter of a fantasy audiobook and looking to fill three major roles. We are looking for actors that would be willing to continue performing throughout the project. Because we record in a sound booth with a small crew, set days are flexible and easy to schedule around work. Pay is small for this first chapter, since it isn't dialogue-heavy, but that will change for later chapters.

Here is the project pitch deck: https://www.ameliarinehartbooks.com/

Title: The Gods Of Blood And Honey

Genre: Audiobook, fantasy

Logline: Under cover of night in a spirit-infested swamp, an assassin and a sorcerer meet over a corpse. One wants to be king, and he wants the other's help.

Roles: 

Zajeira (female 20s, Black) 

Lazhan (male 20s, Black) 

Amur (male 20s-30s, any)

Other roles will be needed as the project progresses, so even if you don't fit these three, we might need you for later chapters.

Production Company: Paper Bird Entertainment

Production Type: Audiobook

Run Time: Single chapter, approx. 20 mins

Compensation: $1 per line rounded up to the nearest $5. For details about line counts for specific roles, please reference the pitch deck linked above. Can also provide audio samples for you to use in your reels.

Union Status: Non-union

Audition Information: Auditions will be done over the phone

Shooting Schedule: Between the 18th and the 22nd, flexible to everyone's schedule.

Filming Location: Community College of Aurora, Lowry Studios voice recording booth

Project Description: This audiobook will be produced and distributed chapter by chapter, so is a long-term project with great flexibility for scheduling.

Please fill out the form below. Thank you for your time!

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSc1gq6VJQ_J8LKWMKlezWeTlzYV6h9zzU9ckzJ75teh94uUzw/viewform?usp=dialog
items.title: docs.google.com

topComments.text: Filled out the form looking forward to auditioning!(:

items.text:
CASTING CALL – COLORADO FEATURE FILM
“THE MIDNIGHT AFTER PROM”

"Prom Night in the quiet town of Richwood Pines takes a deadly turn when something deep beneath the streets turns a night of teenage revelry into a blood-soaked hunt for survival"

Roles:

Jonathan Bennett (Male, 30-60)
Emily's father, stern but kind. A loving husband and proud father.  It's Prom Night, and he's worried that his daughter might be going down the wrong path.

Mindy Bennett (Female, 30-60)
Emily's mother and a loving wife. Raised her daughter like her mother raised her. Emily has always been a good kid, but tonight is Prom, and anything could happen.

EXPEDITED SCHEDULE: Shooting occurs tomorrow, Friday May 8.

🎬 What You Get:
•$20 for 2 hours
• IMDb credit
• Professional-quality footage & photography for your demo reel

📩 To Submit:
Send headshot + contact info to: midnightafterprom@gmail.com
📱 Or text: 303-829-6885 for details

items.text:
CASTING CALL: "The King in Yellow" – Independent Short Film (Non-Union / Unpaid)
Hi everyone! We are an independent production team gearing up for a surreal dramatic horror short film. We are looking for talented actors to bring these haunting characters to life. Food will be provided on set. 

SYNOPSIS: A director working in a theater is so carried away by his script that he loses touch with reality.

ROLES:

• ISAAC (Lead): Male, 30+. Intense, soulful, experiencing a psychological journey.

• MARGARET: Female, 30+. 

• GRACE: Female, any age (preferably younger than Isaac).

• WILLIAM: Male, any age.

• SAMUEL: Male, any age (younger than Isaac).

DATES: Mid-May 2026 (Dates TBD).

LOCATION: Toronto & GTA (including Etobicoke/Guildwood Park).

COMPENSATION: This is a non-union, volunteer project. We are a passionate crew of film graduates and professionals. We provide:

• Professional footage for your demo reel.

• Full catering and a professional, creative environment on set.

HOW TO APPLY:

Please send your headshot or demo reel via DM Facebook or inst: jawish_girl or email it to karinkadyn@gmail.com .

Please specify which role you are applying for in the subject line. Let’s create something legendary!

items.text:
# 🎬【URGENT】CASTING CALL — PAID COMMERCIAL🎬

【TAPE REQUIRED】 Non-Union | Paid | Commercial for a Messaging App  

Shoot Window: Around May 20–24, TBD  

Location: GTA  

Shoot Length: 2-day shoot overall

Project Description:  

This commercial follows a group of teenage boys through their after-school soccer activities. The story focuses on friendship, connection, and the emotional bond between three teens as they navigate youth, teamwork, and growing up together.

Talent who can believably play ages 14–17 are also welcome to submit.

---

Role 1 — Lead Boy / “Ethan”   Day rate: 600

Male, 14–17, or can believably play 14–17  

Ethnicity open  

American / North American teen vibe  

Lead role — expected to be needed for both shoot days  

Must have strong acting ability and be comfortable with emotional expression on camera.

Audition / Self-Tape Prompt — Role 1:  

Please submit a 45–60 second self-tape in English.

Scenario:  

You are moving away tomorrow. While packing, you find your old soccer cleats and an old photo with your friends. You open a group chat and type: “One last practice?” but you hesitate before sending it.

Please show the moment naturally, with one spoken line:

“I don’t know if they still care.”

We are looking for someone who can express a quiet, sincere, bittersweet emotion on camera — not an overly dramatic performance.

Optional: If you play soccer, you may also include a short soccer clip.

---

Role 2 — Friend 1  Day rate:450

Male, 14–17, or can believably play 14–17  

Ethnicity open

Canadian / local friend vibe  

Expected to be needed for 1 shoot day

Audition / Self-Tape Prompt — Role 2:  

Please perform a 15–20 second silent moment: you arrive at the field and see an old friend again. Show warmth, happiness, and a slightly bittersweet feeling, as if this may be one of your last games together.

Optional: If you play soccer, please include a short soccer clip.

---

Role 3 — Friend 2  Day rate:450

Male, 14–17, or can believably play 14–17  

Latino / Hispanic preferred, but open  

Mexican / Latin football energy  

Expected to be needed for 1 shoot day

Audition / Self-Tape Prompt — Role 3:  

Please perform a 15–20 second silent moment: you arrive at the field and see an old friend again. Show warmth, happiness, and a slightly bittersweet feeling, as if this may be one of your last games together.

Optional: If you play soccer, please include a short soccer clip.

---

Looking for natural, expressive teen actors who are comfortable on camera.

To Submit, please include:  

- Name  

- Age  

- Recent photo  

- Demo reel / acting experience if available  

- Self-tape based on the prompt above  

- Parent/guardian contact info if under 18  

- General availability around May 20–24  

- Optional soccer clip if available

Email: avery@rangerfilms.studio  

Subject: intent commercial - [Role]

items.text:
CASTING CALL — STAGE PLAY 🎭

Big Brother Butler Productions is currently casting for the return of the hit stage play **Don’t Tell Grandma I Met Him Online**.

Previous production history includes the DC Black Theatre Festival and a performance at Howard University’s Ira Aldridge Theatre.

We are looking for Black actors in the Washington, D.C./DMV area for several roles.

Also reviewing actors for Brian — Michael’s business partner and moral counterbalance. He is thoughtful, grounded, sincere, and brings a strong contrast to Michael’s confidence and player energy.

This is a stage play, not a film. Initial auditions/readings will be held virtually by Microsoft Teams before any in-person rehearsals.

Experience is preferred, but we are willing to work with committed performers who have strong natural ability, presence, timing, and reliability.

If interested, please inbox Mr. Butler or email ebutler477@aol.com with:

Name
Recent photo/headshot
Acting or performance experience
Role you are interested in
General availability

Serious inquiries only. The production is moving forward, and we are looking for committed talent.

Serious inquiries may also text 301-440-1727.

Cologne: June 12th

## **Free acting taster class!**

**VISIT ACTORSCAFE.CO.UK AND CLICK THE FREE TASTER CLASS TAB.**
## **SIGN UP TO OUR SPotlight Listed COURSES TODAY, SPACES ARE FILLING UP QUICKLY!**

**For all ages 18-80! and all acting abilities from novice to professional. Students are achieving their Spotlight accreditation, landing acting agents, and are developing strong confidence and realism in their craft.**

**Students have previously booked for TV Roles (BBC / ITV / Channel 4) commercials, Independent Feature Films, Short Films, voice dubbing (Netflix / Sky) and have landed fringe theatre productions.**

*CAMILLA ARTHUR CASTING "A massive 'hats off' to you and your team - and thank you. I am blown away with your teaching and your approach and just your generosity of spirit. I loved it."*

Venue: Watford, Finsbury Park, Chelmsford

Dates: May 2026

See actorscafe.co.uk/free-taster-class

**Professional Acting Tuition For All. Our Courses Teach Beginners to Advanced / Spotlight Actors.**

*ALEX SCANLAN. CAM ACTOR'S AGENCY - "Having visited the Actor's Cafe on three separate occasions now, I can really see the great work it produces."*

*CARL PROCTOR. CASTING DIRECTOR -"Everyone seemed to get a lot out of it. A nice group who seem to benefit hugely from you courses."*

*PAUL GIDDINGS. BBC TV DIRECTOR - "Thanks for having us at The Actors Cafe and for creating such a relaxed, positive and supportive environment."*

Apply at [actorscafe.co.uk/free-taster-class]

items.text: Come see Jerry's Girls at No Square Theatre in Laguna Beach!

sharedPost.text:
Don't miss the wonderful world of Jerry's Girls! Come join us for a fun night out where you'll be sure to be laughing and humming along to some of the greatest golden age musical theatre numbers! 

Tickets available at: https://www.tix.com/ticket-sales/nosquare/1804

In this dynamic musical revue, three Divas and three singing and dancing women celebrate the music of Jerry Herman, highlighting the broad spectrum of thrilling material he wrote specifically for female performers. This Broadway hit features all the best songs for women from such immortal musicals as Mame, Hello Dolly!, Milk and Honey, Mack and Mabel, A Day in Hollywood/A Night in the Ukraine, and La Cage Aux Folles.

It affectionately celebrates his special gift for writing songs that capture the true spirit of the American musical theatre. The all-female cast will remind us of how Jerry Herman has given voice to some of the most iconic roles, ballads and show-stoppers ever written for Broadway. A winner of the Tony, Grammy, Olivier, and Drama Desk Awards, Jerry Herman is the master tunesmith of our time.

items.text:
Hi Everyone! My name is Nick, and I am a former actor now pursuing a doctorate in clinical psychology. I am conducting a research study titled “Trauma in Training: The Psychological Consequences of Abusive Practices in Acting Programs,” which examines the impact of abusive practices on actors’ mental health during their training. I am currently seeking participants for a survey. If you are interested, participation in this study will involve completing a demographic questionnaire and three brief mental health measures. You will also have the option to provide additional details about your experiences if you wish to share them. Completion of the survey and questionnaires should take approximately 20 minutes.

**Even though it focuses on actors, I am also looking for non-actors to participate. **

To participate in this study, you must be at least 18 years of age, reside in the United States, be able to provide informed consent, and be able to read and understand English. All survey responses will be anonymous. Participation is voluntary and can be discontinued at any time and for any reason without consequences.

Additionally, it would be very helpful if you could share this survey with others. The more responses I get, the better!

**What are the risks of participating?**

Participants who have experienced physical, emotional, and/or sexual abuse may experience psychological discomfort and/or distress in the process of answering questions related to past experiences.

**What are the benefits of the study?**

There is no direct benefit to participating in this study. However, you will nonetheless contribute to existing research on the psychological issues facing actors, particularly during their training. This may be useful in developing more effective training methods and mental health resources for individuals working and training in the performing arts.

If you have any questions about this, feel free to DM me. Thanks in advance for your time!

items.text:
‼️‼️CASTING CALL‼️‼️ 

CASTING CALL — HERE FALLS THE SHADOWNeo-Noir Action Thriller

Production Type: Independent Film 
(Proof of Concept)

Tone: Dark, grounded, psychological, emotionally drivenShoot 

Location: (Atlanta Ga)

Shoot Dates: (June/ July)

Compensation: (IMDB Credits, Negotiable)

‼️‼️ PROJECT OVERVIEW ‼️‼️

Here Falls the Shadow is a neo-noir action thriller exploring memory, identity, and violence through the story of a man who wakes up in the aftermath of a massacre with no recollection of who he is — only to discover he may be at the center of something far more dangerous than he understands.

This film blends grounded, brutal action with psychological tension, prioritizing performance, atmosphere, and emotional realism.

items.text:
CASTING NOW: HGTV’s Ugliest House in America 

Do you live near the beach in the wildest, weirdest, most unbelievably ugly house around? We want to see it!

We’re searching for homes near the water with:
* Clashing patterns
* Confusing layouts
* Strange additions or DIY disasters
* Design choices that make people say “WHY?!”

items.text: Vidste du, at et enkelt oreganoblad kan understøtte din bronkial sundhed og fordøjelse? Hvis du læser dette, så giv mig et like og find ud af, hvordan du bruger det korrekt.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Bare 1 oreganoblad om dagen, og du vil ikke laengere lide af bronkitis, astma, angst, sovnloshed, gigt- og muskelsmerter, fordojelse, opkastning, diarré og meget mere. Jeg giver dig opskriften med et simpelt OK De bedste naturlige midler'

items.text:
London Casting Call for Leading Role in a Camden Fringe Production
Hello everyone! My name is Liam David Malcolm and I'm excited to announce that a team of us are premiering a new, queer play called Broken Boys to the Hen and Chicken Theatre on August 14th - 16th 😄

We're looking to cast one of two leading roles in this play, and want to hear from you 🫵

See below for more information! If you fit the brief, we'd love to hear from you, or if you know someone who might, please share along 🫶

items.text:
STARS OF TOMORROW 

 @croydoncd_ Croydon

 Saturday 10th October

Models of Diversity is proud to present an unforgettable catwalk experience for young people aged 11–18 who have experienced adversity 

This empowering show is all about celebrating confidence, courage, individuality, and self-expression through fashion, fun, and creativity, with clothing from top brands including @newlook @nextofficial @prettylittlething @ganni and many more 

Our young stars will receive:

 Professional hair & make-up

 Wardrobe styling

 Catwalk coaching

 The chance to shine on the runway in front of family and friends

We’re looking for nominations from:

 Teachers

 Parents

 Responsible adults

To nominate a young person, please email:

 info@modelsofdiversity.org

Please include:

• First name & age

• A recent photo

• A short paragraph explaining why they would benefit from taking part

• Parent/guardian consent and contact details

Let’s celebrate bravery, resilience, and the stars of tomorrow

items.text:
CASTING CALL – LONDON – THEATRE – PROFIT SHARE

We are casting for a new revival/adaptation of **Sophocles’ Antigone**, presented as part of the **Camden Fringe Festival 2026**. Following the successful earlier staging of the production in April, we are now seeking new actors due to the unavailability of some previous cast members. We are looking for performers who are ready to jump straight into an active rehearsal process and work within a fast-paced ensemble environment.

Performances will take place on **8th and 9th August 2026** at the **Barons Court Theatre, London**.

This is an **independent, low-budget profit-share production**, developed by producer and actress **Ioanna Firaku** and director/co-producer **Una Reitere**. Performers will be paid through shared ticket-sale profits. While finances are modest, we are committed to creating a focused, collaborative, and artistically ambitious production.

ROLES AVAILABLE

Creon, Teiresias/Guard and Haemon

We strongly encourage performers of all backgrounds, ethnicities, genders, and abilities to apply. Casting will be inclusive and non-traditional, and all performers should be open to collaborative ensemble and chorus work.

As this production has already undergone an initial development and performance process, we are especially interested in actors who are adaptable, proactive, and confident learning material quickly.

Some roles are text-heavy and require strong memorisation skills, emotional range, physicality, and stamina.

REHEARSALS & PERFORMANCE

* Rehearsals will take place **in person in Highgate, London**.
* Rehearsal dates will be confirmed following casting selections, but rehearsals are expected to take place across **May, June, July and first week of August 2026***.
* Performances will take place on **8th & 9th August 2026**.
* Venue: **Barons Court Theatre, London**.
* Production presented as part of the **Camden Fringe Festival 2026**.

TO APPLY

Please email **antigone.production2026@gmail.com **with:

* The role(s) you would like to be considered for
* A headshot and CV and/or Spotlight link

Selected applicants will be sent a short self-tape audition script.

**Application deadline:** 20/05/2026 midnight

If you have any questions, please feel free to reach out via email.

Thank you,
**Ioanna & Una **

items.text:
Hello everyone,

We're a team of 18 industry professionals, from actors, editors, camera ops, DOPs, composers, directors, writers, independent filmmakers, post sound, gaffers, producers and production assistants who have all come together to enter the Manchester 48hr film project on the 16th-17th of this month. 

We’re looking for a sound recordist/sound mixer with their own kit to join our team for the challenge. 

We’ve already got a strong crew across all other departments, and have an experienced boom operator but unfortunately he doesn't have his own kit. With sound being one of the most important parts of any film, we’re really hoping to bring someone passionate and skilled on board.
As part of the festival rules, this is a purely collaborative passion project, no payment is allowed for cast or crew — it’s all about creativity, teamwork, and making the best film possible within 48 hours. This is something as creatives we are all passionate about, so have come together as one big team to have a fun weekend getting truly creative.

It’s a fantastic opportunity to work with a dedicated team, create something under pressure, and be part of an internationally recognised competition. If we win locally, the film goes on to compete internationally, with finalists having the chance to screen at the Cannes Film Festival.
Sound recordist would only be required on the 16th as that is shoot day. 

The film will then be screened at the Vue cinema in Manchester on the 30th may as part of the festival.

If you’re interested, or know someone who might be a good fit, please get in touch.
Thanks,
Chris

items.text:
**🎬 CASTING CALL – FEATURE FILM 🎬**

Role: University Professor
Gender: Male
Age Range: 40–55
Ethnicity: Caucasian

We are casting for a brief but meaningful role in an upcoming feature film. The character is a university professor whose assistant is once again late for work, and he is clearly unimpressed. Although there is no dialogue, the role carries emotional depth and strong screen presence.

📍 Location: **Surrey City Library, Surrey, BC**
📅 Shoot Date: **May 24, 2026**
⏰ Time: **10:00 AM – 11:00 AM**

This is a volunteer/unpaid position. Crafty and screen credits will be provided.

We are looking for someone expressive, natural, and comfortable conveying emotion through performance without dialogue.

Please send headshots and any acting reels/experience if available to **expressentryfilm@gmail.com**

Masz dyplom szkoły aktorskiej - być może właśnie Ciebie szukamy! ❤️‍🔥
Do cyklicznego serialu realizowanego we Wrocławiu poszukujemy aktorek i aktorów po szkołach filmowych oraz teatralnych
Każda rola to główna postać jednego odcinka! 
👉Zdjęcia realizowane są w różnych terminach, zgłoś się, porozmawiajmy - znajdziemy odpowiedni termin na zdjęcia właśnie dla Ciebie ☺️

👉Zapewniamy hotel oraz zwrot kosztów dojazdu
👉Nowa ekipa, nowe wyzwania i świetna atmosfera na planie!

💌 Z G Ł O S Z E N I A :
AKTORZY@UNAGIMEDIA.PL
Lub bezpośrednio przez link do formularza:
https://forms.gle/CjZENrahxhbhe7Hd8

✔️ aktualne zdjęcia twarzy i sylwetki
✔️ wideowizytówkę

🎭 **Casting Female Performers – KPop Demon Hunters Theme (HUNTR/X)** 🎤✨

We’re casting **2 female performers (16+ / 18+)** for a fun, high-energy children’s party experience!

## 💖 Roles:

🩷 **Mira**
🖤 **Zoey ** 

## 📅 Event Details:

📍 Kinnelon, NJ
🗓️ May 16, 2026

⏰ Arrival: 4:15 PM
🎉 Performance: 5:00 – 6:00 PM

## 🎭 What You’ll Do:

✨ Meet & greet with kids
🎶 Music & dance interaction
🎈 Simple balloon twisting *(can teach basics!)*
💫 Fun, high-energy character engagement

## 💰 Pay:

**$140 flat rate**

## 🌟 We’re looking for:

✔ Reliable & punctual
✔ Comfortable with kids
✔ Positive, energetic presence
✔ Dance/movement friendly *(no professional experience required!)*

## 🎥 Auditions:

📲 Virtual (Zoom)
🗓️ By appointment

## 📩 To apply:

🎬 CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM PROJECT 🎬

We are currently casting REAL ACTORS for an upcoming passion-driven short film project.

This is a VOLUNTEER project, but it offers valuable experience, networking opportunities, exposure, and a chance to be part of something powerful and cinematic.

THE GOOD NEWS IS: We are NOT looking for extras.
We are looking for dedicated actors who can truly perform.

REQUIREMENTS:

• Must know how to act confidently
• Must be comfortable performing action/stunt SCENES even if it's your first time. 
• Passion, discipline, and commitment are important
• Team players with positive energy

This project is focused on building strong talent and creating high-quality work together.

📍Location details and full project information will be discussed in person.
🎭 Roles and shoot details will also be discussed directly with selected applicants.

If you believe you have the talent, confidence, and passion for film — contact 0639889467. 

#Casting #actionfilm #shortfilm #SouthAfricanCinema #actionmovie2026

items.text:
**SHORT FILM CASTING CALL**

**UBCP ULB - PAID HONORARIUM**

***“SEVEN TIMES, SEVENTH”***

**Director:** Hân Phạm

**Producers:** Shakil Jessa, Alger Ji-Liang

**Category:** Independent Short Film - Funded by BC Arts Council

**Casting Director:** Cathy Huynh, Hân Phạm

**Union Status:** UBCP/ACTRA ULB

**Compensation:** $150/day. Food/crafty provided. Copy of film. IMDB credit.

**Filming Dates/Location:** July 3-5, 2026 / Vancouver, BC

**SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS:** Please email **ch17.film@gmail.com** with the subject heading** [Your Name - Role Name]** and include your headshot/photo, demo reel/resume (if you have) and tell us a little bit about yourself!

**LOGLINE:** After her death, Bay, a Vietnamese hairdresser, lingers as a spirit in her old salon. Over 49 Days, visits from her loved ones awaken memories of care, regret, and joy—revealing her quiet life as a matriarchal archive of survival and love.

****OPEN TO NON-ACTORS - NO PREVIOUS ACTING EXPERIENCE REQUIRED****

**BAY - *****Character portrayed is Female, Vietnamese, Late 40s-60s***

Bay is a middle-aged Vietnamese woman who arrived in Canada in the 80s as a boat woman. As the owner of a hair salon, she's hardworking, warm and caring, but is short-tempered and strict towards her staff and her family. Raising a child alone in unfamiliar land as a single mom, she hides the hardships and secrets of her past from her daughter, Dan. **MUST BE FLUENT IN VIETNAMESE AND CONVERSATIONAL IN ENGLISH.**

**HUONG - *****Character portrayed is Female, Vietnamese, 30s-40s***

Huong is a stay-at-home auntie and wife who frequents the beauty salon. She is casual and overly curious, loves gossip, and complains a lot about her husband, but is lighthearted at her core. **MUST BE FLUENT IN VIETNAMESE AND CONVERSATIONAL IN ENGLISH.**

**HONG - *****Character portrayed is Female, Vietnamese, 30s-40s***

Hong is an experienced hairdresser and a friend of Bay. She is kind, understanding and open-minded. She likes to help others resolve conflicts. **MUST BE FLUENT IN VIETNAMESE AND CONVERSATIONAL IN ENGLISH.**

items.text:
**CASTING CALL (TWO LEAD ACTING ROLES)**

**Project Title:** Pill Popper

**Project Type:** Student Short Film

**Union Status:** Non-Union

**Director:** Margaret White

**Producer:** Hayden Perlov / Vancouver Film School

**Casting Director:** Margaret White / Hayden Perlov

**Audition Dates:** Self-tapes due by May 22nd 2026

**Audition Location:** Self-tapes only

**Call Back Dates:** May 24th 2026

*Call Back location/time will be shared after reviewing auditions*

**Shooting Dates:** June 6th-7th 2026

**Shooting Location:** Greater Vancouver Area

**Rates:** Unpaid. Catering and craft service provided.

**Submission Instructions:** Please email **pillpopper_vfs@outlook.com** for submission instructions and sides and indicate which role you’d like to be considered for.

**Synopsis:**

Iris (female, 20-25) is in the depths of her clinical depression. Despite being against prescription medication, Iris’ depression reaches a point where she decides to take her prescribed medicine

for the first time. While on the medication, Iris’ life becomes healthy and sustainable. One night, spent playing games with her friends, Iris remembers why she was so against medication in the 

first place- the dehumanization she sees in it -and pours hers down the kitchen disposal. Once again unmedicated, Iris’ depression becomes the darkest it’s ever been. Desperate and unknowing what to do, she meets with her psychiatrist who guides her back to taking the prescribed medication.

**Character Breakdowns:**

IRIS

Female/Female Presenting

20-25

Open Ethnicity

Iris is stuck in an apathetic depression. With her medication, she’s thoughtful and gentle, and spends her time contemplating her favorite things. The chemicals are in her brain now, but that doesn’t mean she always feels it in her heart, causing her to sometimes become reserved and melancholic. Still, Iris goes through the motions of her day with a smile on her face and a new level of energy, compliant to her psychiatrist’s instructions.

DR. WELL 

Any Gender

45-65

Open Ethnicity

Dr. Well is a forbearing, well-seasoned psychiatrist who works attentively and conscientiously with patients of all ages. Dr Well’s priority is persistently achieving positive results through their patients. While the patient’s well-being is always at the forefront of Dr. Well’s practice, they diplomatically brush past the patient’s experience to get to the results of the current treatment, always searching for the best outcome.

**Notes:**

(TW) Please note this script contains brief discussion of self harm between Iris and Dr. Well and implied self harm and suicidal ideation for Iris. The topic will be approached sensitively and

compassionately, putting the actors' comfort and well-being first. Keep this in mind when submitting your audition. Resources/contacts will be available throughout production.

**Project Type:** Student Short Film

**Union Status:** Non-Union

**Director:** Margaret White

**Producer:** Hayden Perlov / Vancouver Film School

**Casting Director:** Margaret White / Hayden Perlov

**Audition Dates:** Self-tapes due by May 22nd 2026

**Audition Location:** Self-tapes only

**Call Back Dates:** May 24th 2026

*Call Back location/time will be shared after reviewing auditions*

**Shooting Dates:** June 6th-7th 2026

**Shooting Location:** Greater Vancouver Area

**Rates:** Unpaid. Catering and craft service provided.

**Submission Instructions:** Please email **pillpopper_vfs@outlook.com** for submission instructions and sides and indicate which role you’d like to be considered for.

**Synopsis:**

Iris (female, 20-25) is in the depths of her clinical depression. Despite being against prescription medication, Iris’ depression reaches a point where she decides to take her prescribed medicine

for the first time. While on the medication, Iris’ life becomes healthy and sustainable. One night, spent playing games with her friends, Iris remembers why she was so against medication in the 

first place- the dehumanization she sees in it -and pours hers down the kitchen disposal. Once again unmedicated, Iris’ depression becomes the darkest it’s ever been. Desperate and unknowing what to do, she meets with her psychiatrist who guides her back to taking the prescribed medication.

**Character Breakdowns:**

IRIS

Female/Female Presenting

20-25

Open Ethnicity

Iris is stuck in an apathetic depression. With her medication, she’s thoughtful and gentle, and spends her time contemplating her favorite things. The chemicals are in her brain now, but that doesn’t mean she always feels it in her heart, causing her to sometimes become reserved and melancholic. Still, Iris goes through the motions of her day with a smile on her face and a new level of energy, compliant to her psychiatrist’s instructions.

DR. WELL 

Any Gender

45-65

Open Ethnicity

Dr. Well is a forbearing, well-seasoned psychiatrist who works attentively and conscientiously with patients of all ages. Dr Well’s priority is persistently achieving positive results through their patients. While the patient’s well-being is always at the forefront of Dr. Well’s practice, they diplomatically brush past the patient’s experience to get to the results of the current treatment, always searching for the best outcome.

**Notes:**

(TW) Please note this script contains brief discussion of self harm between Iris and Dr. Well and implied self harm and suicidal ideation for Iris. The topic will be approached sensitively and

compassionately, putting the actors' comfort and well-being first. Keep this in mind when submitting your audition. Resources/contacts will be available throughout production.

items.text:
CASTING – WARSZAWA

Poszukuję 2 aktorek do krótkometrażowego filmu dokumentalnego o cosplayu realizowanego na zaliczenie studiów filmowych.

Szukam przede wszystkim dwóch dziewczyn:
– w wieku około 15–18 lat (lub wyglądających młodo),
– o podobnym wzroście,
– podobnej budowie ciała,
– najlepiej również podobnych wizualnie od tyłu (włosy, sylwetka itp.).

Film będzie trwał około 4–5 minut i będzie oparty głównie na ruchu ciała oraz obecności na ekranie. aktorki nie mają kwestii mówionych.

Całość rozgrywa się na scenie teatralnej.
W filmie występują tylko:
– 2 aktorki,
– oraz jedna osoba, z którą przeprowadzany będzie wywiad na temat cosplayu.

Zdjęcia odbędą się w Warszawie i potrwają 1 dzień.
Dojazd we własnym zakresie.

Oferuję 100 zł dla każdej aktorki oraz jedzenie na planie (np. pizza lub coś podobnego wybranego przez aktorkę).

Termin zdjęć:
Na pewno nie później niż 21 maja. Dokładna data jest jeszcze ustalana, ponieważ trwa organizacja i wynajem lokalizacji.

Dodatkowo dowiedziałem się od szkoły, że jedna ze stacji telewizyjnych (nazwa nie została jeszcze podana) jest zainteresowana odpłatnym pokazywaniem wybranych prac studentów mojej uczelni, więc istnieje szansa, że film zostanie pokazany w telewizji.

Do piątku wyślę storyboard (komiks bez dialogów pokazujący ruch aktorów), scenopis (plan wydarzeń filmu), a gdy tylko będę miał dostęp, prześlę również zdjęcia lokalizacji oraz podam jej dokładny adres.

W zgłoszeniu proszę wysłać:
– kilka aktualnych zdjęć,
– demo aktorskie / krótki filmik video zawierający krótką scenkę aktorską oraz pokazanie się z każdej strony,
– imię i nazwisko,
– wiek,
– wzrost,
– rozmiar ubrań.

⏰ Zgłoszenia można wysyłać do 14 maja do godziny 00:00.

 Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać:
– w wiadomości prywatnej,
– na e-mail: [maciejjozefkarolbuk@gmail.com](mailto:maciejjozefkarolbuk@gmail.com),
– lub pod numer telefonu: 734 160 222.

items.summary:
CASTING – WARSZAWA

Poszukuję 2 aktorek do krótkometrażowego filmu dokumentalnego o cosplayu realizowanego na zaliczenie studiów filmowych.

Szukam przede wszystkim dwóch dziewczyn:
– w wieku około 15–18 lat (lub wyglądających młodo),
– o podobnym wzroście,
– podobnej budowie ciała,
– najlepiej również podobnych wizualnie od tyłu (włosy, sylwetka itp.).

Film będzie trwał około 4–5 minut i będzie oparty głównie na ruchu ciała oraz obecności na ekranie. aktorki nie mają kwestii mówionych.

Całość rozgrywa się na scenie teatralnej.
W filmie występują tylko:
– 2 aktorki,
– oraz jedna osoba, z którą przeprowadzany będzie wywiad na temat cosplayu.

Zdjęcia odbędą się w Warszawie i potrwają 1 dzień.
Dojazd we własnym zakresie.

Oferuję 100 zł dla każdej aktorki oraz jedzenie na planie (np. pizza lub coś podobnego wybranego przez aktorkę).

Termin zdjęć:
Na pewno nie później niż 21 maja. Dokładna data jest jeszcze ustalana, ponieważ trwa organizacja i wynajem lokalizacji.

Dodatkowo dowiedziałem się od szkoły, że jedna ze stacji telewizyjnych (nazwa nie została jeszcze podana) jest zainteresowana odpłatnym pokazywaniem wybranych prac studentów mojej uczelni, więc istnieje szansa, że film zostanie pokazany w telewizji.

Do piątku wyślę storyboard (komiks bez dialogów pokazujący ruch aktorów), scenopis (plan wydarzeń filmu), a gdy tylko będę miał dostęp, prześlę również zdjęcia lokalizacji oraz podam jej dokładny adres.

W zgłoszeniu proszę wysłać:
– kilka aktualnych zdjęć,
– demo aktorskie / krótki filmik video zawierający krótką scenkę aktorską oraz pokazanie się z każdej strony,
– imię i nazwisko,
– wiek,
– wzrost,
– rozmiar ubrań.

⏰ Zgłoszenia można wysyłać do 14 maja do godziny 00:00.

 Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać:
– w wiadomości prywatnej,
– na e-mail: [maciejjozefkarolbuk@gmail.com](mailto:maciejjozefkarolbuk@gmail.com),
– lub pod numer telefonu: 734 160 222.

Poniżej w załączniku przesyłam również plan wydarzeń filmu.

items.text:
🎙✨ **OGÓLNOPOLSKI KONKURS WOKALNY
„ODCIENIE GŁOSU”** ✨🎙

Każdy głos ma swoją barwę.
Każdy ma inny odcień.
Jaki jest Twój? 💗💜💙

Po „Głosie Pełnym Emocji”
Po „Oddechu, który niesie”
nadszedł czas na trzeci element wokalnej świadomości — **BRZMIENIE**.

W tej edycji skupiamy się na kolorze głosu —
jego cieple, głębi, świetlistości i naturalnym charakterze.
Na tym, co sprawia, że Twój głos jest rozpoznawalny i prawdziwy.

Nie szukamy jednego ideału.
Nie porównujemy barw.
Każdy głos ma swój własny odcień — i właśnie to chcemy usłyszeć.

🎵 Wybierz utwór, w którym pokażesz swoje naturalne brzmienie
🎵 Zadbaj o świadome prowadzenie dźwięku
🎵 Pozwól swojemu głosowi wybrzmieć w pełni

📅 Zgłoszenia trwają…
📍 Szczegóły i regulamin: [https://www.laboratoriumdzwiekow.pl/konkursy/konkursy-wokalne/regulamin](https://www.laboratoriumdzwiekow.pl/konkursy/konkursy-wokalne/regulamin)

„Odcienie Głosu” — o barwie. O Tobie. O Twoim brzmieniu. ✨

Nie ma jednego właściwego. Jest Twoje. W Wte tej edycji naszego projektu wokalnego skupiamy się się tym, wyjątkowe- kolorze, subtelnościach iindywidualnym brzmieniu, które prawia, że e Twój głos jest niepowtarzalny. [ZLECENIE PŁATNE] 

CASTING!

Poszukujemy osób do krótkich, dynamicznych nagrań rolek na social media dla klienta z branży budowlanej.

Szukamy:

items.text:
🎶🎞️ CASTING 🎞️🎶
Poszukujemy 2 osób, które były na koncercie Dawida Podsiadło i  mają wspólną ciekawą historię związaną z tym koncertem 🙂 
Szukamy osób z Katowic i bliskich okolic, ale rozważymy też inne miasta. 

Na podstawie prawdziwej historii uczestników będziemy kręcić filmik promocyjny dla jednej z marek, która patronuje nowej trasie Dawida. 

🎶 Nagrania odbędą się w Katowicach w dniach 5 i 6 czerwca. Za udział w nagraniach osoby otrzymają wynagrodzenie + wejście na koncert. 

📧 Zainteresowane osoby proszę o przesłanie zgłoszenia do mnie na maila: MONIKALUKASIEWICZCASTING@GMAIL.COM z tytułem ,,Koncert ”.  

Co zawrzeć w zgłoszeniu: 

- przedstawcie się: kim i skąd jesteście co Was łączy;  króciutko opowiedzcie jaką macie wspólną historię związana z koncertem Dawida 🙂 proszę też załączyć jedno Wasze aktualne zdjęcie - jeśli nagrywacie się na video to nie trzeba wysyłać zdjęcia. 

- albo napisz to w treści maila albo prześlijcie to w formie video i podeślij jako link do YouTube 

‼️ W odpowiedzi prześlemy wszystkie szczegóły. 

‼️ Zgłoszenia proszę przesyłać do 18 maja.

items.text:
Casting 2 roles!
Title: Headshot

Genre: Horror

Role: 

**NICKY** — Female, early 20s. New to the city, trying to break into acting. Open, polite, eager to be taken seriously. The role lives in reactions: micro-expressions of discomfort she's actively trying to hide, the slow override of her instincts to be agreeable. We need an actress who can play "trying not to seem rude" with real specificity, not big fear. Mostly silent in the back half — must carry the camera on her face alone. Lead role.

**THE PHOTOGRAPHER** — Male, 30s–60s, open ethnicity. Warm, disarming, professional. The kind of person you'd trust on first meeting. Plays the role completely straight — NOT a creep, NOT menacing. The horror comes from how normal he seems. Stillness, quiet confidence, and a genuine smile are more important than any dark energy. Strong listener with precise line delivery. Lead role.

Production Company: CinemaRaven

Production Type: Indie

Contact Information: sam@cinemaravenproductions.com

Run Time: Short

Compensation: Paid

Union Status: Non-Union

Audition Information: I'll send a script for a video audition. Hoping to have this cast by early June. 

Shooting Schedule: June 24-26 (1 rehearsal day TBD, 2 shooting days

Filming Location: Broomfield CO

Project Description: Logline: A young aspiring actress answers a Craigslist ad for free professional headshots and discovers that the photographer's studio hides something far worse than a scam.

items.title: Casting 2 roles!

items.text:
**Casting Roles for Micro Comedy - Denver DMV**

**PROJECT DESCRIPTION: **

Short-form workplace sitcom that takes place in a “government agency”.  The project will be filmed in a similar style to The Office, Parks & Rec.

**LOGLINE:**

Each day serendipity brings people from all walks of life together at the Denver DMV. A place where those behind the counter are just as annoyed and bewildered as those crammed into plastic chairs awaiting their number to be called.

**FILMING DATE:** TBD

We will be filming 2 days over a weekend either July 18-19 OR Aug. 1-2 in central Denver

**RATE: ** $200/day + 20% agency (10hr)

**USAGE:**  Web, YouTube, Social

**PRODUCTION COMPANY:**  Neato Pictures

**ROLES: ** 

**Janet (F, 60s)**

A local has-been actress now working at the DMV for the last 10 years.  Long after local fame as the ‘84 - ‘86 face of a local dealership, Janet still believes her acting break is just around the corner. Personally driven but not a team player, Janet only works to collect a check.   She is trying to hold onto her youth but her flamboyance often barely covers her insecurities.  

**Carl (M, 50s)**

A no-frills, serious, deliberate man who shows up on time and does everything with purpose. He’s a “lifer” at the DMV having been there over 16 years and doesn’t enjoy change. With a military background, Carl is a man of strict order, tradition, and pride in his work. Rumor has it, Carl was honorably discharged over a chronic case of lock-jaw due to stress. 

**SUBMISSIONS:**  By Monday 5/18

If you have great comedic timing and feel like you might be our Janet or Carl, we'd love to hear from you. 

Please email** Brandy@neatopictures.com** for audition requirements and script.  Thanks for your interest!

topComments.text: Sent you an email with demo reels

items.text:
**FEATURE FILM CASTING CALL **

Hi everyone! I’m back with the final phase of casting for our feature film. Thank you for your incredible response to our project! Our lead casting is currently under consideration with our directors. We are now ready to round out the team and cast our supporting characters. Please see the roles below, and do not hesitate to submit for multiple roles. I hope to see you on set, it’s going to be a blast. Cheers to film in Colorado! 

**Here’s how to audition: **[https://forms.gle/1SyDbMkgmgzf87b28](https://forms.gle/1SyDbMkgmgzf87b28)

**DURANGO SEEMS LIKE A GREAT PLACE TO DIE**

**Feature Film**

Directors: AJ Campli & Matt Bruggeman

Writers: AJ Campli & Matt Bruggeman

Executive Producers: AJ Campli, Matt Bruggeman, Boulder Media House, Tyler Sapp, Chloe Chamberlain, Jill Coats, Crowded Table Pictures

Producer: Tyler Sapp

Casting Director: Chloe Chamberlain

Project Shoot Dates: 7/1-7/14 & 8/14-8/21

Location: Denver, CO / Boulder, CO / Durango, CO 

Logline: *After a heartbreaking divorce, Ezra begrudgingly joins his bohemian mother on a road trip across Colorado to help her die.  *

It’s a very funny movie, with serious undertones. And at its core – it’s a mother/son story. Our story is centered around Medical Aid in Dying and explores the relationships that really impact and shape our adult lives. 

**ROLES:**

**SUPPORTING**
*Rate $400/Day*

**COSMO** Late 60’s - Male - Ex-hippie - 3 Days

**JED & RAT** 35-75 - Males - Goons - 4 Days

**___**
**DAYPLAYER**

*Rate $350/Day* 

**DR. WILBUR** 50’s Male - Mustache, Turtleneck, Large Glasses - Founder of “Ellipses” - 1 Day

**ELLIPSES PATIENT (1, 2, 3)** 50-85 - Any Gender - 1 Day

**SLOANE** Early to Mid 30’s - Female - Waitress - 1 Day

**DR. STEPHEN RISSMILLER** 36 - Male - Professor - 1 Day

**BILL** 52 - Male - Academic Faculty - 1 Day

**KAYLA** 25 - Female - Graduate Student - 1 Day

**CASEY** 27 - Male - Graduate Student - 1 Day
___
**DAYPLAYER - NON-SPEAKING **
*Rate $200/Day*

**PICKLE BALL WIFE** 65-75 - Female - Strong Physical Comedy - 1 Day - Non-Speaking

**PICKLE BALL HUSBAND** 65-75 - Male - Strong Physical Comedy - 1 Day - Non-Speaking

**RECEPTIONIST** Any Age - Any Gender - Receptionist at “Ellipses” - 1 Day - Non-Speaking

___
**DAYPLAYER - VOICEOVER **
*Rate $150/Day*

**ABIGAIL** 30’s - Female - Ezra’s Ex-Wife - Voiceover Only - 1 Day

___

**BACKGROUND**

*Rate $75/Day*

**GRADUATE STUDENTS** 23-30 - Any Gender - English Majors - 1 Day

**DINER PATRONS** Any Age - Any Gender - 1 Day

**CEREMONY CROWD** Any Age - Any Gender - 1 Day

**Thank you again for your excitement and support! Please connect with us on our socials ****below**** for updates, further cast/crew calls, and to see when we’re filming in your neighborhood. Keep in touch!   - The Durango Team :)**

[[https://www.instagram.com/crowdedtablepictures?igsh=eHQ3OHg5cXpteDd2](https://www.instagram.com/crowdedtablepictures?igsh=eHQ3OHg5cXpteDd2)](https://www.instagram.com/crowdedtablepictures?igsh=eHQ3OHg5cXpteDd2)

Information Below:

Dates: Projected Early July- TBD after casting.

Pay Transparency: Unpaid, Non-Union, Film Credits, IMDb Credit, Copy of footage after exhibition and award adjudication ends. 

Time Commitment: Under 4 hours.

Roles: 1 Male, presenting 60-80 (possibility for additional male role 40-50)

Film Themes Disclaimer: if reaching out to casting please ensure your comfort and experience working with themes of loss, grief, and disillusionment. Strong actors recommended to express these themes without dialogue assistance. 

Self tape instructions: comment below your interest and email: indigenousactresschristine@gmail.com to request audition instructions.
